channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Harmeet Dhillon to Newsmax: N.J. Noncitizen Voting a 'Very Serious Matter'
item.description: Assistant Attorney General Harmeet Dhillon told Newsmax on Thursday that the Justice Department views New Jersey's noncitizen voting issue as a serious concern.

item.title: Trump Welcomes the World Series Champion L.A. Dodgers to White House With His Typical Humor
'Allahu Akbar': Two Men Stabbed in Broad Daylight on Manhattan's Upper West Side
THE ESSEX FILES: The WHCA Dinner Should Celebrate the First Amendment, Not Political Theater
